description: Vert.x Core provides the core APIs and runtime primitives of Eclipse Vert.x, a reactive toolkit for building event-driven JVM applications. It supplies low-level building blocks for HTTP, TCP, UDP, filesystem access, asynchronous streams, buffers, futures/promises, event-bus communication, and deployment of verticles.

Vert.x Core provides the core APIs and runtime primitives of Eclipse Vert.x, a reactive toolkit for building event-driven JVM applications. It supplies low-level building blocks for HTTP, TCP, UDP, filesystem access, asynchronous streams, buffers, futures/promises, event-bus communication, and deployment of verticles.
